data.name: GuaranteeBody
data.value: All paid MotoRent subscription plans (Pro and Ultra) come with a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied with our service for any reason within the first 14 days of your initial subscription, you may request a full refund. This guarantee applies to first-time subscribers only and covers both monthly and annual billing plans.

data.name: HowToRequestBody
data.value: To request a refund within the 14-day guarantee period, please contact our support team at support@motorent.app with your account email address and the reason for your refund request. You may also submit a refund request through the contact form on our website. We aim to acknowledge all refund requests within one business day.

data.name: ProcessingBody
data.value: Approved refunds will be processed to the original payment method used for the subscription purchase. Refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days, depending on your payment provider. You will receive an email confirmation once the refund has been initiated. The refunded amount will include the full subscription fee paid.

data.name: PostGuaranteeBody
data.value: After the 14-day guarantee period, the following refund terms apply: For annual subscriptions, you may request a pro-rata refund for the remaining unused months if you cancel before the end of your billing period. For monthly subscriptions, no refunds are issued for the current billing period after cancellation, but you will retain access until the end of your paid period. Downgrades from a higher plan to a lower plan will take effect at the next billing cycle, and no partial refund will be issued for the current period.

data.name: FreeTrialBody
data.value: The MotoRent Free plan does not require any payment and therefore no refund is applicable. If you upgrade from the Free plan to a paid plan, the 14-day money-back guarantee applies from the date of your first paid subscription.

data.name: ContactBody
data.value: For any questions about our refund policy or to request a refund, please contact us at support@motorent.app or through the contact form on our website. Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Thailand time, GMT+7).
